description.zh-Hans: 应用风格化/艺术效果：卡通、油画、浮雕、像素描边和色调分离。
description.en: Applies stylistic / artistic effects: cartoon, oil painting, emboss, pixel art outline, and posterization.

triggers.zh-Hans: 风格化, 卡通效果, 油画, 水彩, 浮雕, 色调分离
triggers.en: stylize, cartoon effect, oil paint, watercolor, emboss, posterize

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 对图像应用卡通效果以创建非真实感渲染风格。
exampleUsage.en: Apply a cartoon effect to an image for a non-photorealistic rendering style.
